name: Two Harbors 14" Patio Tabletop Fireplace Black - Threshold™
description:
Give your outdoor space a cozy ambiance without sacrificing the sleek modern style you love with this Two Harbors Patio Tabletop Fireplace from Threshold™. It has a rectangular design in a black finish with lava rocks placed on the inside for a simple look that pairs easily with a variety of decor styles. An adjustable flame lets you create just the right amount of warmth, along with being made from sturdy heat-resistant steel for lasting use. Simply place this gas tabletop fireplace on your outdoor dining table to instantly create a more welcoming atmosphere for you and your guests to enjoy.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
